MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINE REALTY, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-17-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-24-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COCHRAN, TERESA $1,875.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,875.00, JUDGMNT ENTERED REPRESENTING MONEY OWED THROUGH 1-14-97 PURSUANT TO STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT UPON DEFENDANT'S BREECH OF STIPULATION.

#6, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - RPT,J.LEWIS - CLERK, G.DECKER C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY MARGU- LIES. DEF. PRESENT & REPRESENTED BY ROSALIE DAVIS. SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION OF PREM- ISES AT 500 STANYAN ST, #504,S.F, CA. & VACATING COMPLETE WHEN DEF. RETURNS KEYS TO PROPERTY MANAGER W/NOTE STATING SHE HAS VACATED - $1,875 RENT & DAMAGES TO BE PAID AT $75 MO. STARTING 2-15-97 - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED- NO OTHER ADULT IS IN POSESSION - NO STAYS ON VACATING TO BE GRANTED - IF DEF. COMPLIES TO TERMS OF SETTLEMENT DISMISSAL TO BE FILED - IF DEF. FAILS TO VACATE $1,000 LIQUIDATED DAMAGES BECOMING OWING PLUS THE $1,875 RENT & DAMAGES - IF DEF. DEFAULTS ON HER MONTHLY INSTALLMENT PMT. JUDGMENT MAY ENTER FOR BALANCE OWING - JUDGMENT MAY NOT ENTER WITHOUT 48 HRS. NOTICE TO DEF'S ATTY. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT
